title: Search Services
defaultServiceDesc: Use the server-configured search service without entering parameters.
modelBuiltInDesc: Use the active model's built-in search: Google Search for Google models, OpenAI Web Search for OpenAI Responses models. OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic models should use an external search provider.
capabilityModel: Ready: the selected model can use {provider} built-in search.
capabilityServer: Ready: the server default search service is available.
capabilityClient: Ready: a saved {provider} credential is available.
capabilityPublicService: Ready: Firecrawl works without an API key. Add one for higher request limits.
capabilitySelfHosted: Ready: a self-hosted {provider} endpoint is configured.
capabilityMissingModel: Select a model provider before using search.
capabilityMissingServer: Default search is not configured on this deployment.
capabilityUnsupportedModel: The selected model cannot use built-in search. Choose an external provider.
